title: ecbolium alterum
intro: Ecbolium alterum, also known as the 'Blue Trumpet Vine', is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium alterum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Ecbolium alterum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
